name: turn_left
description: Rotate view left to search or align with target.

name: turn_right
description: Rotate view right to search or align with target.

name: attack
description: Mine or attack the current target.

name: use
description: Right-click or use an interactable object.

name: craft_item
description: Craft a requested item when ingredients and station are available.

name: place_block
description: Place a block in the world.

name: wait
description: Pause because the safe action is not yet available.

name: retreat
description: Move away from a nearby threat.
